Notice Of Motion To Tax Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Costs
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Trial Motion Calendar on Apr-21-2016 in 206 - Appearances by James Millar, Esq., counsel for plaintiff Eva Olin-Mullen, and Jennifer A. Kung Gelini, Esq., counsel for defendant Jacqueline Lee Cheung. Defendant Jacqueline Lee Cheung's Motion to Tax Plaintiff's Memorandum of Costs -- ARGUED and the Court grants Defendant Jacqueline Lee Cheung's Motion to Tax Plaintiff's Costs. Plaintiff's Memorandum of Costs is hereby taxed in the amount of $3,444.45. Plaintiff's Memorandum of costs is hereby reduced to $9,125.93 as recoverable costs after jury verdict. Order signed and approved as to form by the parties. Judge: JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk: JIROQUE; Court Reporter: Matter not reported. (206)
